overall.description: Nighttime walk along the Del Perro Pier in GTA V, featuring a color-changing Ferris wheel, neon-lit commercial buildings, and a transition onto the sandy beach. The footage captures the atmospheric artificial lighting with the Los Santos city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement pier with Ferris wheel attraction

events.description: pedestrian talking on phone passes within close proximity on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier toward the illuminated Ferris wheel

notable_agents.action: man in purple shirt walking toward camera while talking on cell phone, passes by at arm's length

entered.detail: large amusement ride with cycling LED lights in purple, blue, and teal colors
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway with visible grain and gaps
distant illuminated high-rise buildings of the downtown area
tall metal pole with warm yellow sodium vapor lighting
small wooden concession stand with red roof and service windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime pier walk with a massive color-changing Ferris wheel dominating the right side. The camera moves forward along the wooden planks, passing a street lamp and food kiosk on the left. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction and passes closely by on the right, temporarily obstructing the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pier with restaurants and telescope viewers

events.description: Ferris wheel exits frame right as camera passes the amusement area
passing under bright green neon signage of The Pier restaurant, increasing local illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier past commercial establishments with neon signage and beach views

entered.detail: large commercial structure with prominent green neon signage and striped green-and-white awning
sandy beach area visible beyond the pier railing, illuminated by street lights
coin-operated stationary telescope aimed toward the ocean for tourist viewing
large rectangular planter box with flowers positioned on the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Ferris wheel, the scene transitions to the commercial section of the pier featuring The Pier restaurant with its distinctive green neon lighting. The beach becomes visible on the left beyond the railing. The camera continues walking past wooden benches and a coin-operated telescope viewer before approaching the end of the pier structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area at the base of the pier

events.description: sharp left turn toward the beach access stairs
descending wooden stairs from pier level down to the beach
transition from walking to running upon reaching the sand

agents.ego_description: turning toward the beach, descending stairs, and running across the sand following another pedestrian toward the water

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and shorts running ahead on the sand toward the ocean water

entered.detail: weathered wooden staircase with metal railings leading from pier down to beach
soft sandy surface with visible footprints and ripples, replacing the wooden deck
dark ocean water visible beyond the sand, reflecting distant lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with a sharp left turn away from the pier's end, descending wooden stairs to the beach below. The ground transitions from wooden planks to soft sand as the camera follows a running pedestrian toward the ocean. The city skyline shifts to the right rear as the perspective changes to face the water, with the pier structure now visible behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a vibrant nighttime pier that eventually descends onto a dark, sandy beach. It begins by moving forward over wooden planks beneath a massive, color-changing Ferris wheel, passing a street lamp and a food kiosk as a pedestrian briefly crosses the frame. As the camera moves past the wheel, the environment shifts toward a commercial area illuminated by the green neon glow of The Pier restaurant, with the open beach becoming visible beyond the railing. The scene then progresses past wooden benches and a telescope viewer before making a sharp left turn to descend a set of wooden stairs. Finally, the ground transitions from planks to soft sand as the camera follows a running pedestrian toward the ocean, leaving the pier structure and the city skyline behind.
